notes: Implements the formal inverse i(T) for a formal group law via a coefficient-by-coefficient recursion (inverseTrunc), closely mirroring the compInvTrunc pattern in Logarithm.lean; the capstone fAdd_X_inverse_eq_zero (F(T,i(T))=0) is used by EvalGroup.lean to build the formal group structure on nilpotent elements. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides; the longest proof (coeff_fAdd_X_add_monomial, ~140 lines) has most of its bulk in the finsum finiteness argument and Nat.cast-to-C boilerplate, with the genuine mathematical content being the single use of coeff_01 (the right-unit axiom).
